dbt.description: dbt MCP server — browse models, columns, lineage, and docs. Requires uvx (install via https://docs.astral.sh/uv/). Set DBT_PROJECT_DIR in .env for local dbt Core, or DBT_HOST + DBT_TOKEN for dbt Cloud. See .builder/skills/dbt/SKILL.md for setup.

sigma.description: Sigma Computing MCP server — browse workbooks, data models, elements, lineage, and export data. Set SIGMA_CLIENT_ID, SIGMA_CLIENT_SECRET, and SIGMA_API_BASE_URL in .env. See .builder/skills/sigma/SKILL.md for setup.
